title: Bangchak Group Drives Low-Carbon Aviation Unveiling Thailandâ€™s First Dedicated SAF Facility Certified to International Standards
content: Bangchak Group has inaugurated its Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) Production Unit at the Bangchak Phra Khanong Refinery, marking Thailandâ€™s first dedicated facility for producing 100% Neat SAF. Operated by BSGF Company Limited, a Bangchak Group affiliate, the unit complies with rigorous international certification standards, reflecting the Groupâ€™s commitment to green innovation and its evolution from a renewable energy leader to a pioneer of future energy solutions.
author: Analysts Account
